page_metadata.bioconda__summary:
MEGAHIT: An ultra-fast single-node solution for large and complex
metagenomics assembly via succinct de Bruijn graph
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: An ultra-fast single-node solution for large and complex metagenomics assembly via succinct de bruijn graph
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Single node assembler for large and complex metagenomics NGS reads, such as soil. It makes use of succinct de Bruijn graph to achieve low memory usage, whereas its goal is not to make memory usage as low as possible.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Single node assembler for large and complex metagenomics NGS reads, such as soil. It makes use of succinct de Bruijn graph to achieve low memory usage, whereas its goal is not to make memory usage as low as possible.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: A subprogram within the Megahit toolkit for converting contigs to assembly graphs (fastg)
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: Single node assembler for large and complex metagenomics NGS reads, such as soil. It makes use of succinct de Bruijn graph to achieve low memory usage, whereas its goal is not to make memory usage as low as possible.
